Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ragnarus Incarnation]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation has skin that is hard and blood-red like crimson metal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation's eyes are red flames.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 2''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation was once sealed in a dungeon beneath the Blue Room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation is a person who may have been trapped in Cana or trapped themselves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Simon considers the possibility that the Ragnarus Incarnation has the Overlord of Cana under his control.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation shouted that he was going to attack Enosh.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Simon hit the Ragnarus Incarnation’s shield with his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation is an immortal body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — It is a fate worse than death for a Ragnarus Incarnation to be sealed beneath a Hanging Tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The Ragnarus Incarnation's departure led to the surrender of the Damascans.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
